title: Galactic Suit redirects missed attack roll to attacker

card.rawText: If your opponent misses their Hit Roll against the equipped creature, they must roll their Atk Roll against their primary creature.

effect.value: If your opponent misses their Hit Roll against the equipped creature, they must roll their Atk Roll against their primary creature.

plan.title: Galactic Suit redirects missed attack roll to attacker
plan.summary: Equip Galactic Suit and verify a missed Hit Roll redirects the opponent Atk Roll against their own primary creature.

forcedRolls.label: Headless Gen3 QA redirected damage route

notes: Read text first: If your opponent misses their Hit Roll against the equipped creature, they must roll their Atk Roll against their primary creature.

steps: Set up Galactic Suit according to its printed text.
Equip Galactic Suit and verify a missed Hit Roll redirects the opponent Atk Roll against their own primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent primary took redirected attack damage

manualVerification: Confirm against printed text: If your opponent misses their Hit Roll against the equipped creature, they must roll their Atk Roll against their primary creature.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.
